div.h1: Professional Roofer in Swindon, Royal Wootton Bassett, Malmesbury, Cirencester and All Surrounding Areas
div.div: Welcome to GAC Roofline Ltd. Your trusted roofers in Swindon, Royal Wootton Bassett, Malmesbury, Cirencester and beyond.

div.h2: Your Local Roofing and Roof Repair Specialists

div.p: At GAC Roofline Ltd, we’re a family-run roofing company with over 35 years of combined experience, proudly serving domestic and commercial clients in Swindon, Royal Wootton Bassett, Malmesbury, Cirencester, and surrounding areas. Whether you’re looking for a small patch repair or a full new roof installation, our experienced team of roofers deliver high-quality results every time.

Contact us today to discuss your roofing needs. We’re here to help with a wide array of roofing services, including all commercial and domestic roofing, flat roofs, full roof repairs, patch repairs, chimney crack repairs, warm roof conservatories and full new roofing installations.
We’re fully insured, trusted, and known for our friendly, not-pushy approach. All work is guaranteed, competitively priced, and backed by our outstanding customer reviews.
We handle everything from minor patch repair jobs to major roof restorations, and always with quality and durability in mind.
If you need a new roof, we can supply and fit a complete system with a long-lasting guarantee and expert finish.
Our flat roof services include the installation and repair of EPDM, felt, and GRP systems for domestic and commercial use.
We upgrade old conservatory roof structures to energy-efficient warm roof conservatory systems for year-round comfort.

We’re proud to be a professional roofing company rooted in the local community. All trades are provided in-house, and our roofers are highly qualified with NVQs, City and Guilds certifications, and public liability insurance. We also offer a one-year workmanship guarantee.

As specialists in commercial and domestic roofing and services such as flat roofing, we’re always happy to guide you through your options, provide transparent quotes, and even show you examples of our completed work nearby. From minor patch repairs to warm roof conservatories and upgrades, customer satisfaction is at the heart of everything we do.

div.h2: Get In touch for a free no obligation quote
div.p: Speak to one of our friendly professionals today or send our team a message directly using the information below.

div.noscript: Please enable javascript in your browser!

div.div: As expert roofers, we offer a wide range of roofing services for both homes and businesses. We specialise in pitched and flat roof installations, including EPDM rubber, GRP fibreglass, and torch-on felt systems.

Whether you’re tackling a chimney crack repair, replacing a roof, or upgrading to a new warm roof conservatory, GAC Roofline Ltd is your go-to roofer in Swindon, Royal Wootton Bassett and all the nearby locations. Our team offer professional advice, competitive pricing, and outstanding results for every roofing project.

Whether you need a quick roof repair or a completely new one, we’re here to help you in Swindon, Royal Wootton Bassett, Malmesbury, Cirencester and the nearby areas. Our team can also assist with guttering, soffits, cladding, and conservatory roof replacements. Our roofing services overall include:

li.h3: Dry Verge and Dry Ridge Roofing
Torch-On Felt, EPDM, GRP, and Multi-Ply Roofing
Chimney Crack Repairs, Pointing and Removals

div.div: Please contact our specialist roofers today by calling 07472 606611 or 01793 467686 for more information. We cover Swindon, Royal Wootton Bassett, Malmesbury, Cirencester and the surrounding areas.

Unit 1-3 Marshgate Industrial Estate
Swindon
SN1 2PA

div.div: By clicking “Accept All Cookies”, you agree to the storing of cookies on your device to enhance site navigation, analyze site usage, and assist in our marketing efforts. View our Privacy Policy for more information.

When you visit websites, they may store or retrieve data in your browser. This storage is often necessary for the basic functionality of the website. The storage may be used for marketing, analytics, and personalization of the site, such as storing your preferences. Privacy is important to us, so you have the option of disabling certain types of storage that may not be necessary for the basic functioning of the website. Blocking categories may impact your experience on the website.
These items are required to enable basic website functionality.

These items are used to deliver advertising that is more relevant to you and your interests. They may also be used to limit the number of times you see an advertisement and measure the effectiveness of advertising campaigns. Advertising networks usually place them with the website operator’s permission.

These items allow the website to remember choices you make (such as your user name, language, or the region you are in) and provide enhanced, more personal features. For example, a website may provide you with local weather reports or traffic news by storing data about your current location.

These items help the website operator understand how its website performs, how visitors interact with the site, and whether there may be technical issues. This storage type usually doesn’t collect information that identifies a visitor.
